title: Sweet Mexican Jam Stir-Fry
description: A festive and low-carb-friendly Yucatecan dish featuring sweet jam as a main ingredient for a silky and delightful stir-fry.

ingredients.name: Chicken Breasts
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are cooked to at least 165°F (74°C) for safety.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced chicken and sauté until golden brown and cooked through (about 5 minutes).
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add finely chopped bell peppers, red onion, jalapeno (if using), and garlic. Stir-fry for about 3-4 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Add the sweet Mexican Jam to the pan with the vegetables and stir well for an additional minute to meld flavors.
Return the chicken to the pan with the vegetable mixture, ensuring all pieces are coated in the jam. Cook for another minute.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
